name: Saltveil Expedition
specialty: A tenacious duo known for their unorthodox approaches to dismantling rifts, utilizing a blend of arcane knowledge and physical prowess.

members.name: Kaelis Winterwhisper
members.note: Scarred from numerous rift encounters, he carries a mysterious, ancient-looking dagger.

members.name: Vexa Saltveil
members.note: Her keen senses and uncanny ability to navigate the Undercity's labyrinthine streets make her invaluable.

visual: Clad in leather and chain armor, they move with purpose, carrying a variety of enchanted weapons and tools. A salt-stained emblem, symbolizing their guild, adorns their chests.
reputation_note: Rumored to have survived encounters that would've destroyed less experienced teams, their names are whispered with both awe and caution in the Undercity.
